mechanism: Geopolitical escalation triggers permanent fiscal commitments (defense spending, supply chain duplication, sanctions compliance) that structurally increase deficits and Treasury supply, reinforcing the fiscal channel of positive correlation with no symmetric de-escalation offset.
regime_dependence: Cumulative and irreversible: each geopolitical escalation adds to the fiscal burden. De-escalation does not remove sunk commitments. Accelerates under multiple simultaneous geopolitical tensions.
